command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time, sys
cmd = ['node','--import','./src/resources/extensions/gsd/tests/resolve-ts.mjs','--experimental-strip-types','--test','src/tests/integration/parity-diagnostics-contract.test.ts']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd='.', capture_output=True, text=True)
duration = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f'EXIT={proc.returncode}')
print(f'DURATION_MS={duration}')
print('--- STDOUT ---')
print(proc.stdout)
print('--- STDERR ---')
print(proc.stderr)
PY

command:
python3 - <<'PY'
import subprocess, time
cmd = ['node','--experimental-strip-types','tests/parity/diagnostics.ts','--report','tests/parity/artifacts/baseline-report.json']
start = time.time()
proc = subprocess.run(cmd, cwd='.', capture_output=True, text=True)
duration = int((time.time()-start)*1000)
print(f'EXIT={proc.returncode}')
print(f'DURATION_MS={duration}')
print('--- STDOUT ---')
print(proc.stdout)
print('--- STDERR ---')
print(proc.stderr)
PY
